title: Luffy Protects His Crew
description: Foxy uses his Noro Noro Beam and the arena itself to trap Luffy, but Luffy keeps pushing forward.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene focuses on Foxy, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Foxy uses his Noro Noro Beam and the arena itself to trap Luffy, but Luffy keeps pushing forward.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You will soon fly in there...

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: On the other side of this door...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It would be against the rules.

summary: Foxy uses his Noro Noro Beam and the arena itself to trap Luffy, but Luffy keeps pushing forward.
